title: Dental Prosthesis Technology Program Educational Objectives
content:
Dental Prosthesis Technology Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To train dental prosthesis technicians with the necessary knowledge and skills for the production of fixed and removable prostheses and maxillofacial prostheses in private and public institutions providing all kinds of dental treatment services.

2. To train qualified and competent dental prosthesis technology technicians who can work in dental prosthesis laboratories within health institutions.

3. To be qualified and competent in the field of Dental Prosthesis Technology.

4. To have the ability to apply various prosthesis production methods in Dental Prosthesis Technology.

5. To train dental prosthesis technology technicians who adopt ethical values and consider social benefit.

6. To protect the quality of life related to health by considering social benefit.

7. To adopt professional ethical principles and have high communication skills.

8. To adopt patient and employee safety issues.
